zh.lifeSummary: 當Baroness Margery La Zouche於1251年出生在英國英格蘭艾可可拉維林時，她的父親Alan la Zouche I I46歲，母親Helen Quincy29歲。她於1265年與Robert FitzRoger Clavering結婚。他們至少是13個兒子和6個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baroness Margery La Zouche于1251年出生在英国英格兰艾可可拉維林时，她的父亲Alan la Zouche I I46岁，母亲Helen Quincy29岁。她于1265年与Robert FitzRoger Clavering结婚。他们至少是13个儿子和6个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: La
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Zouche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Georges, Adrien.
from Old French bosche ‘large bundle of firewood’, used as a metonymic occupational name for a seller of such bundles.

variants.name: Boucher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Normand, Andre, Marcel, Emile, Gilles, Lucien, Yvon, Adrien, Jacques, Laurent, Alcide.

French: occupational name for a butcher or slaughterer, from Old French bouchier, a derivative of bouc ‘ram’. Compare Bouche 2, Bouchey , Bouchie , Boushey , Boushie , Bush 5, Busha 1, Busher , and Bushey 3.
English: variant of   Butcher  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: When Baroness Margery La Zouche was born in 1251, in Clavering, Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Alan la Zouche I I, was 46 and her mother, Helen Quincy, was 29. She married Robert FitzRoger Clavering in 1265. They were the parents of at least 13 sons and 6 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baroness Margery La Zouche est née en 1251, à Clavering, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Alan la Zouche I I, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Helen Quincy, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Robert FitzRoger Clavering en 1265. Ils ont eu au moins 13 fils et 6 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baroness Margery La Zouche 1251 in Clavering, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alan la Zouche I I 46 und ihre Mutter Helen Quincy 29. Sie hat 1265 Robert FitzRoger Clavering geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 13 Söhne und 6 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baroness Margery La Zouche è nata il nel 1251 nel Clavering, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Alan la Zouche I I, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Helen Quincy, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Robert FitzRoger Clavering nel 1265. Erano genitori di almeno 13 figli e 6 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Baroness Margery La Zoucheが1251年にイギリスイギリスエセックスクラバーイングで生まれた時，父Alan la Zouche I Iは46歳，母Helen Quincyは29歳であった。1265年にRobert FitzRoger Claveringと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも13人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Baroness Margery La Zouche(이)가 1251년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 클레이버링에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alan la Zouche I I(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helen Quincy(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1265년 Robert FitzRoger Clavering(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baroness Margery La Zouche nasceu em 1251, em Clavering, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Alan la Zouche I I, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Helen Quincy, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert FitzRoger Clavering em 1265. Eles tiveram pelo menos 13 filhos e 6 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baroness Margery La Zouche родилась в 1251 г. в местности клавиринг, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Alan la Zouche I I было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Helen Quincy, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert FitzRoger Clavering в 1265 г. У них было по крайней мере 13 сыновей и 6 дочерей.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baroness Margery La Zouche nació en 1251, en Clavering, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Alan la Zouche I I, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Helen Quincy, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Robert FitzRoger Clavering en 1265. Fueron padres de por lo menos 13 hijos y 6 hijas.
